name: Tripp Lite 350VA 210W Ultra-compact Standby UPS - 6 NEMA 5-15R Outlets - 6.50 Hour Recharge - 2 Minute Stand-by - 120 V AC Input - 110 V AC, 115 V AC, 120 V AC Output - Single Phase - Pure Sine Wave - USB (INTERNET350U)
